description.text: Avoid getting cornered and having your health devoured. One Base.

ru.original: Avoid getting cornered and having your health devoured. One Base.
ru.translation: Хочешь жить — не дай врагу загнать себя в угол. Одна база.

es.original: Avoid getting cornered and having your health devoured. One Base.
es.translation:
¡Que no te devoren los fantasmas!
Un núcleo.

de.original: Avoid getting cornered and having your health devoured. One Base.
de.translation: Lasst euch nicht in die Ecke treiben, sonst wird eure Gesundheit verschlungen. Eine Basis.

fr.original: Avoid getting cornered and having your health devoured. One Base.
fr.translation: Attention aux ennemis cachés dans les coins ! Une base.

pt.original: Avoid getting cornered and having your health devoured. One Base.
pt.translation: Evite ser encurralado e ter seus pontos de vida devorados. Uma Base.
